name: DATA I/O CORP
summary: Data I/O Corporation is a global provider of advanced programming, security deployment, and IP protection solutions for electronics manufacturing. The company designs, manufactures, and sells automated and manual programming systems (PSV family), security deployment systems (SentriX), and programming engines (LumenX, FlashCORE) targeting flash memory, microcontrollers, secure elements, and authentication devices. Customers include OEMs, EMS contract manufacturers, and programming centers in automotive, IoT, industrial, and consumer electronics markets.

products.name: PSV2800 Automated Programming System
products.description: Dedicated high-volume manufacturing programming system in a lower cost platform.

products.name: PSV7000 Automated Programming System
products.description: Well-adopted automated programming system for automotive electronics and security deployment upgrades.

products.name: PSV5000 Automated Programming System
products.description: Mid-range capacity and flexibility automated programming system supporting security deployment.

products.name: PSV3500 Automated Programming System
products.description: Lower cost platform for basic automated programming needs.

products.name: SentriX Security Deployment System
products.description: Software license or pay-per-part system for provisioning keys and certificates into secure elements and microcontrollers.

products.name: LumenX
products.description: Highest performance programming engine supporting eMMC, UFS, NAND FLASH, microcontrollers, and serial FLASH devices.

products.name: FlashCORE
products.description: Programming engine available in automated and manual programming systems.

products.name: FlashPAK III
products.description: Manual programming system with four sockets, parallel programming, and network control via Ethernet.

products.name: Tasklink for Windows
products.description: Universal job setup tool available across automated and manual programming system families.

products.name: ConneX Service Software
products.description: Enables connected factory integration and automation for PSV systems.

partnerships.description: Notable OEM customer in automotive electronics segment.
